title: Trojúhelníčky is out on iOS and Apple TV
content: Libor, our one-man development army, just shipped his first game. Tight, fast, and slightly addictive.

blocks.text: Libor, our one-man development army, just shipped his first game. Trojúhelníčky is a geometry-based shoot-'em-up — Galaga vibes, suprematist aesthetics, 9 levels that each last exactly 25 seconds.
Tight, fast, and slightly addictive. Available on iOS and Apple TV.

blocks.label: Get it on the App Store

title: Go Rally is on Nintendo Switch
content: After years on mobile, Go Rally finally made it to a real controller.

blocks.text: After years on mobile, Go Rally finally made it to a real controller. The Switch version has a rebuilt graphics engine, 100 tracks across deserts, snowscapes and outback, and the same career mode that tens of thousands of mobile players have already put to the test.

title: Go Rally is live on iOS
content: Go Rally is live on iOS — iPhone, iPad, universal. Published by Chillingo.

blocks.text: Go Rally is live on iOS — iPhone, iPad, universal. Tracks, cars, career mode, a track creator, and cross-play with Apple TV.
Published by Chillingo. Go get it.

title: Go Rally launches on Apple TV
content: Go Rally launched on Apple TV on February 4, 2016 — published by Chillingo.

blocks.text: Go Rally launched on Apple TV on February 4, 2016 — published by Chillingo. Pass-and-play multiplayer, Siri Remote controls, big-screen visuals.
The kind of game you hand to a family member who "doesn't really play games" and then have to pry from their hands.

title: Go Rally — coming to iOS
content: We're building a rally game for iOS. Arcade feel, custom track editor, full touch controls.

blocks.text: We're building a rally game for iOS. Arcade feel, custom track editor, full touch controls.

title: 5Gum Sound Painter
content: 5Gum launched in Czech Republic, and they needed something weird for their site.

blocks.text: 5Gum launched in Czech Republic, and they needed something weird for their site. We built Sound Painter — a canvas where your mouse draws both visuals and music simultaneously.
Move slowly for ambient drones, slash fast for chaos. Built a custom particle engine in Alchemy for Flash to make it happen.

title: We've moved
content: Four years in a basement in Dejvice. Now we've surfaced — new office in Smíchov.

blocks.text: Four years in a basement in Dejvice. Now we've surfaced — new office in Smíchov, near Arbesovo náměstí, actual windows, actual sunlight.

title: The site is back
content: After a longer break than planned, the site is back — new design, lighter codebase.

blocks.text: After a longer break than planned, the site is back — new design, lighter codebase, content still trickling in. The important stuff is already here.
